paragraphs: Melbourne CBD continues to represent one of Australia's highest-conviction investment precincts for off-the-plan apartments.
With net overseas migration into Victoria at decade highs and apartment completions at their lowest in 10 years, the supply-demand imbalance creates a rare entry point for SMSF and investor clients.

items: Net overseas migration into Victoria at decade highs — 140,000+ per annum (ABS, VIF23)
FY2025 apartment completions the lowest on record — just 3,070 BTS apartments (Urbis)
Melbourne median house prices 41% cheaper than Sydney — largest discount in 20 years
$107 billion Victorian Infrastructure Plan — Suburban Rail Loop, Greenline, QVM renewal
Major banks forecasting RBA cash rate to fall to 3.35–3.85% by Dec 2025

paragraphs: To reserve this property for your client, please log in to the TPCH Partner Portal and submit a 48-hour hold request. Stock is updated in real time from our Monday.com project management system.

sections.text: Properties at this price point and yield are moving quickly. TPCH recommends presentation within 5 business days of receipt of this document.
